articles.title: Karnataka CM power play: DKS sought Priyanka’s help after no green signal from Rahul
articles.description: D.K. Shivakumar's bid for the Chief Minister post gained traction after Priyanka Gandhi Vadra intervened, persuading Rahul and Sonia Gandhi. Siddaramaiah reportedly conveyed his decision to resign, though he is hesitant about a national role. A press conference is expected before his resignation, with Shivakumar attending a breakfast meeting.
articles.full_text: Manu Aiyappa has been with The Times of India for over two decades, currently serving as the Political Editor. His reporting focuses on politics, public policy, and in-depth features that aim to inform and engage a broad readership. Over the years, his work has been recognised by both the Press Club of Bangalore and the Karnataka Media Academy for its clarity, credibility, and relevance to public discourse. Read More

articles.title: 2 suspected Ebola cases trigger airport surveillance, quarantine measures across nation
articles.description: Following reports of suspected Ebola infections in Bengaluru and Gujarat, Indian health officials have intensified surveillance at airports and introduced stringent quarantine measures. A Ugandan woman has fortunately tested negative in Bengaluru, while a 37-year-old man in Gujarat is currently being watched closely after traveling from Africa and Bangladesh.
articles.full_text: Anuja Jaiswal is a Senior Assistant Editor at The Times of India, with an impressive 18-year career in narrative journalism. She specializes in health and heritage reporting, expertly simplifying complex health information to make it engaging and understandable for readers. Her deep dives into heritage topics are well-researched, resulting in captivating narratives that resonate with her audience. Over the years, she has worked in Chandigarh, Chhattisgarh and West UP, gaining diverse on-ground experience that shapes her storytelling. Read More

articles.title: 'Haters will say you're not 15': Sooryavanshi turns heads with record knock
articles.description: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi’s stunning IPL 2026 season continued with a blistering 97 off 29 balls against SRH, including 12 sixes. The 15-year-old broke Chris Gayle’s record for most sixes in a T20 tournament. Cricket legends Sachin Tendulkar, Andre Russell, Yuvraj Singh and Mohammed Kaif praised the RR star, who now has 680 runs and multiple IPL records this season.

articles.title: Three months of Hormuz chaos: Oil prices jump 3% amid US-Iran standoff
articles.description: Oil prices saw a dip as hopes for a US-Iran deal to ease Middle East tensions and reopen the Strait of Hormuz emerged. Despite earlier drops, crude prices are recovering slightly. President Trump emphasized his focus on preventing Iran's nuclear ambitions and ensuring the Strait's accessibility, warning against interference.

articles.title: 'War left regime desperate for cash': US sanctions authority overseeing Strait of Hormuz as Middle East conflict enters 90th day
articles.description: The US has imposed fresh sanctions on Iran's new Strait of Hormuz authority, escalating economic pressure. This follows US strikes on Iranian military sites after drone downings. The sanctions target the agency regulating transit and charging tolls, impacting global oil and gas supplies. Negotiations for a war-ending deal continue amidst heightened tensions.

articles.title: LeT turns on its Pakistan masters over recognising Israel
"Superman to Clark Kent": Clavicular heavily trolled after quitting testosterone as viral transformation shocks viewers
articles.description: Looksmaxxing influencer Clavicular, whose real name is Braden Peters, faced intense online criticism after appearing noticeably different following his decision to quit testosterone and other substances. The backlash came weeks after a hospitalization linked to a health scare that prompted him to rethink his lifestyle. While critics mocked his reduced physique, many supporters praised his choice to prioritize long-term health and well-being over maintaining an image built around extreme looksmaxxing practices.

articles.title: "Charlie makes me emotional": Candace Owens revisits old Charlie Kirk post after reaching new YouTube milestone
articles.description: Candace Owens announced that her YouTube channel has surpassed 6 million subscribers, up from 1.35 million when her independent show launched. She credited viewers for the growth, noting that the platform expanded without advertising or outside investors. Owens also reflected on an old Charlie Kirk post celebrating one million followers, saying its resurgence made her emotional. The milestone highlights the growing influence of independent digital media and audience-driven content creation.

articles.title: ODI tickets worth Rs 52.36 lakh went unsold: Khanna
articles.description: "Tickets worth Rupees 52,36,000 were unsold. Why all the tickets were not sold-out? DDCA started online ticket sale quite late that too without proper advertisement," Khanna claimed in a media release.

articles.title: MPESB Jail Prahari and Forest Guard admit card 2026 released at esb.mp.gov.in: Direct link to download hall tickets
articles.description: The Madhya Pradesh Staff Selection Board (MPESB) has released admit cards for the Van Rakshak and Jail Prahari Recruitment Examination 2026. Candidates can download their hall tickets from esb.mp.gov.in to appear for the exam scheduled from June 4 to June 19, 2026. The admit card is mandatory for entry and must be carried with a valid photo ID.

The admit card is mandatory for entry and must be carried with a valid photo ID.

articles.title: KCET 2026 result date: When will KEA release UGCET scorecards?
articles.description: Karnataka Common Entrance Test (KCET) 2026 results are expected soon on cetonline.karnataka.gov.in, likely after June 1st. Over 3.3 lakh candidates can check their scorecards online using application number and name. The exam, held April 22-24, had no negative marking. Students must upload marks for result preparation. A rank list and subsequent admission process will follow.

articles.title: REET Mains Result 2026 out at rssb.rajasthan.gov.in; merit list released for 7,759 teacher posts: Check direct link to download here
articles.description: The Rajasthan Staff Selection Board (RSSB) has announced the REET Mains Result 2026 for Level 1 and Level 2 examinations on its official website. Candidates can now check the merit list PDF for the recruitment of 7,759 third-grade teacher posts. Shortlisted candidates will proceed to the document verification stage. Check complete details here.

articles.title: HPBOSE opens Class 10, 12 compartment and improvement exam registrations 2026; June 1 last date to apply without late fee
articles.description: Himachal Pradesh Board has opened registrations for Class 10 and 12 compartment and improvement exams 2026. Students can apply without a late fee until June 1, 2026, with a ₹1000 late fee applicable until June 5. Exams are scheduled for June-July 2026. Fees vary by category, with detailed information available on the HPBOSE website.

articles.title: Who is in ‘The Testaments’ season 2
articles.description: Great news for 'The Testaments' devotees! Creator Bruce Miller has revealed that the brilliant Elisabeth Moss will reprise her role in season 2, joined by the talented Chase Infiniti, Lucy Halliday, Ann Dowd, and more.

articles.title: Kunal Kohli says Ranveer Singh is going to give a FLOP again
articles.description: Filmmaker Kunal Kohli strongly defends Ranveer Singh, urging audiences to look beyond box office numbers. He emphasizes that every actor faces hits and flops, and setbacks don't define a performer's talent. Kohli highlighted Singh's brilliant performances even in films that didn't succeed, advocating for a more nuanced view of stardom and failure. Read on to know more in detail.

articles.title: ‘Spider-Noir’ X review
articles.description: Nicolas Cage's 'Spider-Noir' series, set in 1930s New York, is captivating audiences, with viewers overwhelmingly preferring its black and white presentation. This alternate universe take on Spider-Man, inspired by the comic, is being lauded for its gritty noir aesthetic, sharp writing, and compelling execution, making it a must-watch for many.

articles.title: WATCH: Jr. NTR pays tribute to N. T. Rama Rao
articles.description: Actor Jr. NTR honored his legendary grandfather, N. T. Rama Rao, on his 103rd birth anniversary with an emotional social media tribute and a visit to NTR Ghat. He shared a heartfelt Telugu message expressing deep reverence for the iconic actor and former Andhra Pradesh Chief Minister, whose legacy continues to inspire.
